evidence.text: As a new realtor, joining Keller Williams has been a game-changer. The company offers exceptional training programs like Ignite and access to resources that help you build a strong foundation in real estate. The collaborative culture is unmatched, with agents and leaders always willing to share knowledge and support. The technology tools provided, including the Command platform, are user-friendly and designed to str...

Keller Williams is an outstanding real estate company that truly prioritizes its agents and clients. Their top-notch training and support make it easier to succeed in the industry. Their culture of collaboration and integrity sets them apart, and their commitment to helping agents grow professionally is unmatched. I highly recommend them! Culture of collaboration and integrity sets them apart

Keller Williams is a leader in the real estate industry and values their agents. Have really appreciated the training opportunities, agent community and high level leadership support. Great Company and Community
Community oriented, helps achieve goals, results driven atmosphere, friendly, etc. Great work environment!
The support and very positive work environment Lots of training and support

Strong leadership focused on growth and accountability. Consistent, high-quality training and coaching. Supportive, collaborative culture. Encourages innovation and long-term success. Great new agent coaching programs. A Brokerage That Invests in Agent Growth and Development

evidence.role: Former employee - Director of Agent Services
evidence.text: During my time at KW I learned a lot and was able to take what I learned and transition it into other positions in real estate, I am grateful I was able to learn as much as I did. Great company, leadership teams vary
The KW corporate brand has a lot to offer Poor Leadership and Culture

The training and support from leadership is phenomenal. Meetings very motivational, inspiring. and filled with important information for the success of agents. The lead investing broker was approachble and a key influence on the firm. Great Training programs, and leadership team
Great team atmosphere and benefits, professional development opportunities Great Team, Shaky Leadership
flexible schedule and work life balance is great Great work-life balance
High earning potential Flexibility Profit sharing program Review
Respectful of work life balance Great Work Environment
Long history of success, solid training program, excellent branding, experienced agents as mentors in my office Good Workplace
Work life balance is good. Great Place to work
Hands on learning on the job, great for entry level admin professional hungry to learn Overworked and Underpaid but Lots of Learning and Development Opportunity
Pros are that its very good and highly good pay Review
Broker is incredible, individual business owner was not. Terrible
training, travel, bonus potential, networking na
Excellent training program for new agents. Monthly team meeting is beneficial. Good Training
Commission splits, desk fee, help, accountability, culture, events, training Sales Representative - Great Company + Culture
Supportive environment and fun culture. Great Culture
KW has a supportive environment Great place to work!
Interact with amazing clients and vendors; every day is a new experience Proceed with caution
Win/Win Culture for clients and agents. Supportive Environment, Top of the line training. Get ready to grow! Best Brokerage in Town!
Not very invested in you Great
Terrible management. They were not very pleasant Not a friendly environment
If you choose not to be involved, you will not reap the benefits Awesome company

- Brokers don't care about your well-being - Several agents were snarky and back stabbing - Commission splits are not fair for the level of support provided - Forced to be a part of the mentorship program with 0 support from any "mentor", took 10% of every transaction Mediocre Pyramid Scheme-like Brokerage
there really aren't any cons. I love it here
Overworked, Underpaid, Culture, Stretched-Thin, Lack of Support, Systems, and Tools. Overworked and Underpaid.

evidence.role: Former employee - Director of First Impressions
evidence.text: Low pay, little room for advancement Low pay
Underpaid for the amount of work completed Great Company, Underpaid
Underpaid for positions and current economy Underpaid
No health insurance or benefits offered Great Training

- No growth, and if you ask for growth or responsibilities, you'll get told that you should just be happy you have a job - No managerial feedback whatsoever - You can get all the degrees, certs, and do a million side projects to try to prove your worth while you're at this company, and god forbid someone even says "Way to go you, that's great!" much less let you have more responsibilities. No recognition, no appreci...

Realtors are independent contractors, so your business is your business. If you are expecting leads to be handed to you they will not be. This is not just true about this brokerage, it is most brokerages. Excellent Leadership
No mentorship I was out of office for 2 months nobody asked about me A lot of classes but no mentorship
- The company is still in its early stages of establishment in our region. - Certain technologies specific to our region have not yet been fully implemented. A company of growth
Realestate is not an easy career path and takes time and effort but well worth it. Great Training
100% commission. No benefits. Work-life balance doesn't exist. Always on call. Good culture but poor work-life balance
There is no Work-Life Balance. Good work environment and support
Scattered priorities, disorganized engineering structure, no real pathways to career growth, Realistic Expectations, Scattered Priorities
Commission-based, unpredictable schedule, nothing else Good
Not compensated enough in comparison to expectations Good Experience

evidence.role: Former employee - Assistant Market Center Administrator
evidence.text: Enables emotional abuse (gaslighting, degrading comments, etc). Will make you work outside of your agreed upon time without appropriate pay. No guaranteed breaks or time to even eat lunch most days. Low Pay and Emotional Abuse
Downright dishonest, shady, and abusive. Toxic, Cultish, Authoritarian, and Dishonest
They allow toxic people to be horrible as long as they close deals Focused on quantity
Horrible toxic work place, definitely have to watch your back Review
This company will pick profits over people every time. They will keep Team leaders that are abusive and harassing as opposed to employees that are being harassed and threatened. Profits over people
